name: play_game
description: Run a sequence of N button presses in the emulator and return the final state + screenText (and optionally per-step records). Used to 'gather' results before a single LLM call.
implementation: bug_catcher.api_client.run_actions(agent_key, actions) or loop step() and collect state/screenText

output.state: Final game state after last action.

note: The current play loop runs one step at a time (step) and records each for raw log and short-term memory; run_actions can be used for batch execution when per-step logging is not required.
